sections.paragraph:
- Original: μυέω

- Transliteration: Mueo

- Phonetic: moo-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to initiate into the mysteries

2. to teach fully, instruct

a. to accustom one to a thing

b. to give one an intimate acquaintance with a thing

- Origin: from the base of G3466

- TDNT entry: 17:48,6

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From the base of G3466; to initiate that is (by implication) to teach: - instruct.
